review_stats.best_theme: Physical AI / 机器人 / 自动化

categories.label: 缺少 FMP 预期/财报快照
categories.fallback: 优先 FMP；失败时使用 Finnhub/SEC/Nasdaq earnings fallback。

categories.label: 接口权限/限流受限
categories.fallback: 升级套餐、降低频率或使用 SEC/公司 IR 替代证据。

categories.label: R/R 未达 2:1
categories.fallback: 等待回调、上修目标价或提高止损逻辑质量。

opportunities.name: Arista Networks
opportunities.theme: AI 光模块 / CPO / 数据中心网络
opportunities.action: 可试仓观察：不是重仓普通买入，按明确止损和目标小仓验证。
why_changed: 退回观察，等待重新触发
美股候选 R/R 0.58:1 低于 2.0:1，退回观察。
证据可用但需补强
新增试仓路径：严格回踩未到，但当前价位已有入场/止损/目标/R/R。
buy_conditions: 什么时候买：现价不高于试仓触发价，允许小仓/1股试仓；这不是重仓买入信号
价格触发：现价 ≤ 169.45 USD 才考虑；高于触发价不追
风控框架：止损 165.73 USD；目标 202.33 USD；当前 R/R 8.83:1
执行纪律：只能按整股/小仓验证；跌破止损不补仓；目标或逻辑变化后重新计算
确认信号：趋势不恶化，且财务/事件/产业链证据至少一项继续改善
avoid_conditions: 高于触发价明显追涨不买，等待下一次回踩或重新计算
R/R 回落到 1.5:1 以下不做试仓；普通买入仍要求 2:1 以上
数据缺口未修复时只允许试仓观察，不升级为重仓买入
invalid_conditions: 跌破止损 165.73 USD 后路径失效
财报/指引/订单/价格证据弱于预期
产业链需求或核心假设被证伪

data_health.name: SEC EDGAR company data
data_health.message: SEC fallback returned data for 16/16 checked US symbols.
data_health.impact: Impacts official US filing and financial statement evidence.

data_health.name: FRED
data_health.impact: Impacts macro regime, rates, inflation, labor and credit spread evidence.

data_health.name: Alpha Vantage
data_health.message: Alpha Vantage fallback completed with 21 successful response blocks; limited/empty responses are kept as data gaps.
data_health.impact: Impacts earnings estimates, surprise, calendar and transcript fallback confidence.

data_health.name: OpenFIGI
data_health.impact: Impacts cross-market symbol mapping only; does not replace official filings.

data_health.name: Yahoo Finance
data_health.message: Yahoo public chart fallback returned 15/15 HK/A quote blocks.
data_health.impact: Impacts HK/A price, technical levels and mechanical R/R fallback; not official filings.

data_health.name: CNINFO
data_health.message: CNINFO official disclosure fallback returned 11/11 A-share records.
data_health.impact: Impacts A-share announcement/financial statement confidence; official CNINFO metadata is used when available.

data_health.name: HKEXnews
data_health.message: HKEXnews official disclosure fallback returned 4/4 HK records.
data_health.impact: Impacts HK announcement/financial statement confidence; official HKEXnews metadata is used when available.

market_sentiment.stance: 情绪中性，等待方向确认
market_sentiment.summary: 综合情绪分 57.3，状态 Neutral。最强支撑来自波动率压力（82.5）。主要拖累来自避险资产相对表现（33.5）。该结论只决定仓位/进攻性倾向，不直接给个股买点。

components.name: 波动率压力
components.message: VIX 越低代表恐慌越少，但过低也可能意味着拥挤。

components.name: 股票指数短线表现
components.message: 用 SPY/QQQ/DIA/IWM 涨跌幅判断当天股票风险偏好。

components.name: 成长/小盘相对强弱
components.message: 成长股和小盘股相对大盘越强，风险偏好通常越高。

components.name: 避险资产相对表现
components.message: 股票强于长债/黄金代表风险偏好改善；反之提示避险。

components.name: 宏观流动性/信用背景
components.message: FRED 流动性、金融条件和信用利差用于判断风险资产背景。

components.name: 油价/通胀压力
components.message: 油价快速上涨会压低情绪分，因为它可能强化通胀和利率压力。

data_gaps.message: 市场指数暂缺 20/50/200 日均线结构
data_gaps.impact: 情绪雷达暂不判断中期趋势位置，只判断短期风险偏好
